school.name: Madhav Vidyapeeth
school.tagline: Nurturing Minds. Shaping Futures. Building Character.
school.cbse_affiliation_scope: Up to Senior Secondary Level (Class XII)

managing_body.name: Gramin Shiksha Evam Swasthya Utthan Sansthan

why_cards.title: CBSE Affiliated
why_cards.desc: Affiliated to CBSE (No. 1731221), valid 2026–2031. NCERT-aligned curriculum meeting national standards.

why_cards.title: Safe Campus
why_cards.desc: Secure, clean, supervised campus environment. Every student's safety and well-being is a constant priority.

why_cards.title: Experienced Faculty
why_cards.desc: Led by Principal Ms. Beenu Yadav (MA, M.Ed). Qualified teaching team focused on concept-driven learning.

why_cards.title: Transport Facility
why_cards.desc: Transport available for Hadota and nearby areas. Contact school office for route and timing details.

academics.desc: Play-based NEP 2020-aligned early learning. Language, numbers, creativity, social skills.
CBSE-NCERT curriculum. English, Hindi, Maths, Science, Social Studies, Computer Education, Art.
Comprehensive CBSE programme. English, Hindi, Sanskrit, Mathematics, Science, Social Science, IT.

testimonials.text: We are very happy with the environment at Madhav Vidyapeeth. The teachers are attentive and the school focuses on building real understanding.
testimonials.author: Parent of Class IV Student

testimonials.text: The school has excellent discipline and very caring staff. My child enjoys going to school every day. Transport facility is also convenient.
testimonials.author: Parent of Class II Student

testimonials.text: English-medium CBSE education close to our village without travelling to Jaipur city. Madhav Vidyapeeth gave us that right here.
testimonials.author: Parent of Class VI Student

mandatory_disclosure.note: All CBSE-required disclosure documents must be uploaded by the school administration to the website's Mandatory Disclosure page.
